The server IP is moving. See the Join page for the new address. Update To 26.2 In Progress. See the status page Here

How to Join

The server is whitelisted. Contact an admin to get added before joining.

To get whitelisted, email admin@labyrinthmc.org or find Bennett at Labyrinth.

Switching To The New IP

Remove the old server address/server or edit it, put in the address and port for your system, see down

Java Edition
Server Address mc.labyrinthmc.org

No port needed — the address resolves via SRV.

If the current game server version is ahead or behind of your game version see Here for instructions.

Bedrock Edition

The server runs Geyser and Floodgate, so Bedrock players can join too.
Server Address bedrock.labyrinthmc.org
Port 58543

PC & iPad

Enter the server address and port above in the Add Server screen.

Consoles

There are several ways:

  • BedrockTogether — an iOS/Android app that makes any server appear as a LAN game
  • Geyser DNS — may work depending on your platform; still being tested with the new Bedrock UI
